raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, making sentence- and paragraph-level readability the main expected paper-writing responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose that the delegation is underspecified and inferred from a short request.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong claims such as first field-validated, so avoiding overstated responsibility is relevant.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projection and not perform the requested paragraph review or edits.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or inappropriate downstream use.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's paragraph-level research-writing context."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, making sentence- and paragraph-level readability the main expected paper-writing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose that the delegation is underspecified and inferred from a short request.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong claims such as first field-validated, so avoiding overstated responsibility is relevant.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projection and not perform the requested paragraph review or edits.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or inappropriate downstream use.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's paragraph-level research-writing context.
